summary: Crisp soundboard capture of an enjoyable 1994 show, highlighted by Truckin', Days Between and a final Smokestack Lightning with a strong second‑set space jam.
review: The Miller‑taped soundboard is praised for its crisp, round fidelity, delivering one of the best‑sounding versions of this late‑1994 concert. Musically the performance shines on Truckin', the expansive Days Between/Space segment and the closing Smokestack Lightning, while the first set is viewed as merely serviceable.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for recording quality (5‑star) and generally positive comments on the show (mostly 4‑star or higher), with only minor mixed remarks about the first set.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as crisp, round and an upgrade over previous releases; noted as the last performance of Smokestack Lightning captured with superb clarity.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as forgettable by one reviewer, but overall serviceable; second set praised for solid flow, extended space jam and strong closing numbers.
